trigger_condition.note: Prefer fewer systems at full optimal f rather than many systems at reduced levels

sizing_rule.note: Trade n uncorrelated market systems at full optimal f rather than (n×m) systems at reduced f levels. The rule prioritizes quality system selection and correlation analysis over quantity, constrained by margin availability. Example: 3 systems at full optimal f preferred over 300 systems at fractionally reduced levels.

source_rule_text: Trade fewer market systems at full optimal f levels rather than many systems at dramatically reduced levels due to margin constraints and correlation considerations.
